title: Role-model: protocol for assigning the right AI model for the right job
abstract: Never let your AI assistants take on the wrong tasks again with "Role-model: Protocol for Assigning the Right AI Model for the Right Job." Just as you choose the right collar for your dog, select the perfect model for each task. This tool helps you easily match the best AI companion to every job, ensuring no mix-ups. Give it a try!
abstract_zh: 这回可别再让你的AI小助手干错了活！"角色模型：为每个任务挑选合适的AI模型"就是你的救星。就像给狗狗选对项圈一样，给AI也得挑对“衣服”。用它，你就能轻松找到最适合每项工作的AI小伙伴，再也不怕搞混了。快来试试吧！
